overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a heavy rainstorm on a desert highway. The player walks along a wet concrete bridge with vehicles passing by, then turns off-road toward a large industrial facility with prominent ventilation pipes and steam vents.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked desert highway with concrete barriers

events.description: white van passes by on the right side of the road
green SUV drives past with headlights on in the heavy rain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right shoulder of the rainy highway, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: green SUV driving past the camera position with headlights illuminated
black pickup truck passing by on the wet road surface

entered.detail: tall concrete safety barrier running along the left side of the highway
large green industrial facility with flat roof visible in the distance
tall rectangular concrete arch structure spanning the road in the distance
wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires along the roadside
scattered desert vegetation including joshua trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a rain-soaked desert highway during a heavy downpour. Concrete barriers line the left side while various vehicles including SUVs and pickup trucks pass by on the right. In the distance, a large concrete arch structure spans the road, and a green industrial building is visible on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial facility exterior with large ventilation pipes and steam vents

events.description: turns sharply right off the paved highway onto the wet dirt ground
moves from paved road surface to unpaved desert terrain approaching the industrial building

agents.ego_description: turns off the highway and walks through wet desert terrain toward the industrial facility, eventually approaching the large ventilation pipes

notable_agents.action: military truck driving past on the highway behind the camera

entered.detail: unpaved desert ground saturated with rainwater and puddles
massive cylindrical industrial pipes running along the building exterior
vents emitting white steam or smoke near the building base
wall with colorful painted graffiti including a shield emblem and number 03

segments.scene_description: The camera turns off the highway and traverses wet desert terrain toward the industrial facility. As it approaches, large ventilation pipes and steam vents become prominent on the building's exterior. The concrete highway barriers recede into the background as the camera focuses on the building's graffiti-covered walls and industrial infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rain-drenched highway toward the imposing exterior of an industrial facility. It begins by walking along a wet concrete bridge amidst a heavy downpour, with vehicles passing by and a large concrete arch spanning the road in the distance. As the camera turns away from the highway, the concrete barriers recede and the terrain shifts to sodden desert ground. The scene then opens up to reveal a green industrial building, where the focus shifts toward graffiti-covered walls and massive ventilation pipes. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera approaches the facility's exterior, bringing prominent steam vents into clear view.
